description_long: This is a black ceramic cup with a smooth, glossy finish and a sturdy, rounded handle. The front of the cup features the word 'Kanaï' in a bold, gold font above an intricate ouroboros-style circular emblem, also in gold. The cup has a slightly tapered cylindrical shape, wider at the top and narrowing towards the base. The handle is ergonomically curved, allowing for a comfortable grip. The interior appears to be the same black material as the exterior, and the cup is of standard size suitable for hot beverages. The overall design is elegant and modern, with a touch of personalized or branded flair.
description: A glossy black cup with a gold 'Kanaï' inscription and ouroboros emblem, featuring a curved handle and a sleek, modern look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the handle and a partial glimpse of the gold emblem and text.
description_view_1: Rear view with no visible handle, text, or emblem; only the plain black surface is visible.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle fully visible on the left, but no text or emblem in sight.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the gold 'Kanaï' text and ouroboros emblem prominently, with no handle visible.
